name: morphase
description: Local-first open-source conversion router — convert, download, and transform files on your machine

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const major = Number(process.versions.node.split('.')[0]); if (major < 20) { console.error('morphase must be published from Node 20 or newer. Current runtime: ' + process.version + '. Run nvm use 24 (or another Node 20+ release) and retry npm publish.'); process.exit(1); }" && pnpm -C ../.. build && pnpm -C ../.. typecheck && pnpm -C ../.. test
